description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The ramp features a smooth, curved surface for skating, with a central black strip and prominent white star graphics on each side. The sides of the ramp are decorated with a collage of graffiti-style artwork and urban motifs, adding a vibrant, street-inspired aesthetic. Sturdy white metal guardrails run along the top edges for safety, and the platform areas at each end provide space for skaters to prepare or rest. The structure is elevated and robust, designed to withstand repeated use and heavy impacts. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, making it a focal point in any urban playground or skate park.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with graffiti-decorated sides, white metal guardrails, and bold star graphics on the skating surface. Designed for skating and tricks, it stands out with its urban, street-inspired look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the ramp, central black strip, white star, and graffiti-covered side panels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full curved profile of the half-pipe, both star graphics, and the continuous guardrails along the top.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite star graphic and graffiti panels visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, highlighting the ramp's curvature, guardrails, and the second star graphic.
